articles.title: Monero Team Receives Anonymous $500,000 Donation
articles.description: The Monero development team has received a significant anonymous donation of $500,000 to support its ongoing projects and initiatives. The contribution underscores growing interest and investment in the privacy-focused cryptocurrency, which aims to enhance user anonymity in digital transactions. The team plans to utilize the funds to further develop Monero's technology and ensure its...

articles.title: Ripple CEO Replies To Former SEC Chairman On Crypto Regulation, They See Eye To Eye?
articles.description: Ripple and the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) have an ongoing legal battle. The regulator filed an action against the payment company at the end of 2020. Many believe that this was former SEC Chairman, Jay Clayton, decision before leaving office. During his administration, Clayton’s SEC denied several Bitcoin ETF proposals and was known […]

articles.title: XRP Supply Shock Could Be Coming if Ripple Decides To Settle SEC Lawsuit, Says Crypto Legal Expert
articles.description: A crypto legal expert is predicting that Ripple’s native token XRP may face a supply shock if the San Francisco-based firm settles its lawsuit with the U.S Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). In a new video, lawyer and XRP supporter Jeremy Hogan discusses a scenario in which Ripple is able to settle its legal battle […]

articles.title: Open Interest in Red-Hot Ethereum Surpasses Open Interest in Bitcoin
articles.description: Following the recent cryptocurrency market crash that saw the price of bitcoin plunge from a near $64,000 all-time high to $29,900 before it recovered to $36,000, open interest for bitcoin has dropped significantly, while for Ethereum it surged. According to CryptoCompare’s May 2021 Exchange Review, Ethereum’s priced ended the month of May down just 2.5%; […]

articles.title: Bitcoin mining hardware maker Canaan opens new service center in Kazakhstan
articles.description: Chinese bitcoin mining machines manufacturer Canaan has set up its first overseas after-sales service center in Kazakhstan.

articles.title: PancakeSwap Posts a Week with 1 Million Unique Wallets
articles.description: While BSC led the charge for blockchains, with over 417,000 unique active wallets at month’s end, PancakeSwap led the dApp list, averaging 350,000 daily active wallets.

articles.title: CoinShares lists Bitcoin, Ethereum and Litecoin ETPs on Germany’s Börse Xetra
articles.description: CoinShares has announced that its Bitcoin, Ethereum and Litecoin physically-backed exchange traded products have cross-listed on Germany’s Börse Xetra exchange.
